name: Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup celery with leaves, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Rinse beans in cold water and place them in a soup pot. Add all other ingredients except salt, pepper, and sherry. Simmer for at least three hours or until a bean can be easily crushed.
STEP TWO: Return to heat and add salt, pepper, and sherry. Adjust the consistency as desired. If too thin, add a small amount of roux made from equal parts butter and flour. Stir over heat until thick and creamy. If too thick, add a small amount of chicken stock. Serve sprinkled with grated cooked egg or thinly sliced raw onion and garnished with Dry Sack Sherry and a dollop of sour cream.
